summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements. Backend changes add youtubeUrl, roomId, roomPassword fields to the Tournament type, a migration file is added, and frontend hooks/admin dashboard are updated. However, REQ-8 (Player Dashboard DashboardPage.tsx updates) is not evidenced in the diff, and there are questions about whether REQ-6's admin-authenticated actor usage is fully implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the Player Dashboard (DashboardPage.tsx) Tournaments section to display Room ID and Room Password for tournaments the player has registered for. Also display the YouTube stream URL (as a clickable link) for each tournament if set by admin.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes to DashboardPage.tsx are mentioned in the diff summary. The diff shows only AdminDashboardPage.tsx, useQueries.ts, backend/main.mo, backend/migration.mo, and project_state.json/frontend-file-summaries.txt were modified or added. DashboardPage.tsx is not listed among modified files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the Admin Dashboard page to use the correct admin-authenticated actor for all data queries and mutations. Fix the useQueries hooks used in the admin context to pass the admin actor instead of a user actor.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows AdminDashboardPage.tsx is modified and useQueries.ts is updated, but the visible hook code in useQueries.ts still uses the generic useActor() hook rather than a dedicated admin actor. There is no evidence of an admin-specific actor hook or that admin queries use a different authenticated actor from the user actor.
